title: Building
description: All the necessary mods to build comfortably in minecraft
body:
Welcome to ![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5551773eb320382f78bc29beb758fecb9c83203f.jpeg)
a Minecraft 1.20.1 Fabric modpack designed for those who see the world as a canvas but don't want to sacrifice the "soul" of the survival experience. This pack is a neutral, vanilla-plus base that focuses on two pillars: **limitless creative potential** and **deeply grounded immersion.**

Whether you are terraforming a continent or surviving your first night, these mods work in harmony to make the world feel alive, responsive, and easy to manipulate.

Feel free to modify this modpack in any way, use it as a base modpack for a bigger collection of mods or use it to change the textures and add any shader youd like. It is truly a visual refined and neutral spectacle open for any potentiality.
---

## 🏗️ The Architect’s Toolkit

These mods provide the "heavy lifting" for construction, allowing you to build faster and more accurately than ever before.

* **Axiom:** The crown jewel for builders. It combines a sophisticated editor with real-time manipulation tools, effectively bringing professional-grade 3D modeling power into Minecraft.
* **The Mighty Architectury:** Perfect for planning, this helps you visualize and build complex structures through procedural blueprints.
* **Effortless Structure:** Adds tools for symmetry, mirroring, and rapid block replacement, making large-scale builds feel like a breeze rather than a chore.
* **Accurate Block Placement Reborn:** Ensures that when you are building at high speeds, blocks land exactly where you intend—no more "ghost" placements or misfires.
* **Command blocks in Creative (CBC):** Streamlines the process for technical builders who use command blocks to automate their worlds.
* **Copy World:** A vital utility that lets you clone your survival world to a creative test-bed with a single click to prototype your next grand project.

---

## 🌿 A Living, Breathing World

Immersion is about the details. These mods synergize to create a world that reacts to your presence and the passage of time.

### Visual Depth

* **Distant Horizons & Bobby:** These work together to give you nearly infinite render distance without melting your GPU. You can finally see your builds from kilometers away.
* **Iris Shaders & Sodium:** The gold standard for performance and lighting.
* **EMF (Entity Model Features) & ETF (Entity Texture Features):** These provide full Optifine-parity for custom entity models and textures, making mobs look more varied and detailed.
* **Fresh Animations & Fresh Moves:** Gives every animal and monster fluid, personality-filled movements.
* **Falling Leaves, Leavesly, & LambdAurora (Better Grass):** Adds life to the flora, making forests feel dense and breezy.
* **Better Clouds & Better Snow Coverage:** Overhauls the atmosphere and the way weather interacts with the terrain.
* **Wakes & Effective:** Adds ripples, splashes, and water trails, making the oceans feel fluid rather than static.
* **True Darkness & Dynamic Lights:** Nights become truly dark and atmospheric, but your torches will emit light while held in your hand to guide your way.
* **Visuality, Particular, & Particle Effects:** Adds subtle "pop" to the world through custom particles like sparkles, bone meal puffs, and hit effects.

### The Player Experience

* **3D Skin Layers, First-person Model, & Wavey Capes:** You aren't just a floating camera; you see your body and your cape reacts to the wind (thanks to **Immersive Winds**).
* **Eating Animation & Visual Workbench:** Adds physical presence to survival tasks. Items actually sit on your crafting table rather than disappearing into a menu.
* **Camera Overhaul & Perception:** Adds subtle camera tilting and motion blur that mimics real-world movement.

---

## 🔊 The Symphony of Sound

Audio is 50% of immersion. This pack uses a layered audio engine to ground you in the environment.

* **AmbientSounds & Dynamic Surroundings:** These add bird chirps, wind howling, and forest whispers that change based on your biome.
* **Presence Footsteps:** Overhauls the sound of walking on different surfaces—wood creaks, gravel crunches, and metal clangs.
* **Sound Physics Perfected:** Adds realistic reverb and muffling. If you build a large hall, your footsteps will echo; if you are behind a wall, sounds will be dampened.
* **Drip Sounds:** Adds the rhythmic "plink" of water in caves or under leaky roofs.
* **Dynamic Music Updated & True Adaptive Music:** The soundtrack now reacts to your situation, building tension during combat and relaxing while you build.

---

## 🛠️ Survival & Quality of Life

Even a builder needs to eat and navigate. These mods refine the survival loop without breaking the vanilla feel.

* **Antique Atlas 4, Xaero's Minimap, & Surveyor:** A comprehensive mapping suite. Use the Atlas for an immersive "hand-drawn" feel or Xaero's for precision.
* **Inventory Profiles Next & Mouse Tweaks:** Essential for organization. One-click sorting and intuitive dragging make managing chests of building materials effortless.
* **Seamless Sleep:** No more jarring cuts to black; the sun and moon visibly speed up as you drift off.
* **Beautiful Potions:** Replaces generic potion bottles with unique, hand-crafted visual models.
* **TalkBubbles & No Chat Reports:** Clean, immersive communication for multiplayer play via the **Essential Mod**.

---

## ⚡ The Engine (Performance)

To ensure all the above runs at 144+ FPS, the pack is built on a massive stack of optimization "hidden" mods:

> **Core Performance:** Lithium, FerriteCore, ModernFix, Starlight, C2ME (Chunk Multithreading), VMP (Very Many Players), and Noisium.
> **Rendering Tweaks:** Entity Culling, More Culling, Enhanced Block Entities, and ImmediatelyFast.
> **Polish:** Remove Reloading Screen, Fadeless, Smooth Gui, and Smooth Scrolling.

---

### Meta & Utility

* **Mod Menu & YetAnotherConfigLib (YACL):** Access all your settings easily.
* **Dark Mode Everywhere:** Saves your eyes during late-night building sessions.
* **Screenshot to Clipboard:** For instantly sharing your builds on Discord.
* **Item Borders & Prism:** Adds subtle UI flourishes to help you identify rarities and items at a glance.
---
**And much much more!**
